Title: MemorySmith.Agent — Testing Infrastructure & Conventions
Content:
The test project (MemorySmith.Agent.Tests) uses NUnit 4.6.1 with standard mocking patterns. ~63+ tests as of Sprint 40.

## Test Stack

- NUnit 4.6.1, NUnit3TestAdapter 6.2.0, Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk 18.6.0
- coverlet.collector 10.0.1 for code coverage
- GitHubActionsTestLogger 2.4.1 for CI annotations
- Moq or manual mock implementations (MockMemoryGateway, etc.)

## Test Categories

Based on test file organization:
- Domain model tests (~7): WorldState, Position, ItemSpec, Fact
- Memory gateway tests (~7): RestMemoryGateway, MockMemoryGateway, SearchResult disambiguation
- Tool engine tests (~4): ToolDispatcher, InputSchema validation, tool call routing
- World adapter tests (~6): MinecraftAdapter, WebSocketBridge, message serialization
- Planner + goal tests (~15+): HtnPlanner, each goal type IsComplete/HasFailed, PlannerRouter routing, decomposer registration
- Integration tests (~6): Full pipeline tests (Connect → Plan → Dispatch → Event → Complete), ReconnectAfterFailures, etc.
- Chat interpreter tests: ChatInterpreter pattern matching, LlmChatInterpreter JSON parsing, confidence threshold behavior

## Mock Strategy

- MockMemoryGateway: in-memory implementation of IMemoryGateway for unit tests (no real MemorySmith instance needed)
- MockWorldAdapter: simulates WebSocket events for pipeline testing
- Test-injectable delays: optional constructor params with 'null = use defaults' pattern so tests can inject zero-delay values
- file-scoped test helper classes: use 'file' modifier to avoid name collisions

## CI Configuration

- GitHub Actions with single build-and-test job on ubuntu-latest
- ci.runsettings activates GitHubActionsTestLogger
- dotnet build --no-restore first (restore cached in CI)
- dotnet test with coverage via coverlet.collector

## Known Issues

- coverlet.collector 6.0.4 doesn't exist on NuGet — use 10.0.1
- XPlat Code Coverage locally shows 'Unable to find datacollector' but tests still pass (exit 0)
- Sandbox NuGet restore may fail with proxy 407 — workaround: start authproxy.py on port 9081, override HTTPS_PROXY/https_proxy
- Some test data fixtures use real Data/Memories files — tests should copy to temp storage before mutation (per copilot-instructions.md)

## Test Patterns

- Arrange/Act/Assert with descriptive test names (TestName_Scenario_ExpectedBehavior)
- Test categories via [Category('name')] attribute
- Async test methods with Task return type
- Parallel test execution within assembly (NUnit default)

## Scripts

- Scripts/Validate-Repo.ps1: default local validation entrypoint. Flags: -IncludeCoverage, -IncludeE2E, -IncludeDocs
- Scripts/ directories also contain utility scripts for sandbox setup and data management
